title: symphyotrichum ciliolatum var. maccallae
intro: Symphyotrichum ciliolatum var. maccallae, also known as Mountain Aster, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can aid in wound healing and reducing pain and inflammation. The Mountain Aster is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
